TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: TsouNr-pear-wang-3
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: pan to mo cihi ci mo ake'i mameoi ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: psn to mo ʦihi ʦi mo skeʔi msmeoi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: pan to mo cihi ci mo ake'i mameoi ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: psn to mo ʦihi ʦi mo skeʔi msmeoi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 有一位有點年紀的男人
There was a somewhat old man.

S.FORM: moso toa to beahci to bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: moso tos to ɓeshʦi to ɓɨnɨvhɨ.
S.FORM: moso toa to beahci to bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: moso tos to ɓeshʦi to ɓɨnɨvhɨ.

TRANSL.notes: (他)在採李子

S.TRANSL: 在採李子

TRANSL.notes: (He) was picking plum.

S.TRANSL: was picking plum.

S.FORM: mo pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eakako to eangi ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo psn to mo suʦsefi ʦi mo esksko to esŋi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: mo pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eakako to eangi ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo psn to mo suʦsefi ʦi mo esksko to esŋi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 有個男的牽著一隻羊經過.
There was a man pulling a goat passes by.

S.FORM: o'a isi maka mi'usni mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o ho mo toa.
S.PHON: oʔs isi msks miʔusni mo ssonɨ sŋu ʔsnsnsʔo ho mo tos.
S.FORM: o'a isi maka mi'usni mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o ho mo toa.
S.PHON: oʔs isi msks miʔusni mo ssonɨ sŋu ʔsnsnsʔo ho mo tos.

TRANSL.notes: 他沒有注意到(經過的人),他採得太認真了.

S.TRANSL: 他沒有注意到 ,他採得太認真了.
He didn't even paid him attention because of his hard working on picking.

S.FORM: oh mo asngʉc toa ho mʉ isi teapha na ito fucu na ito to isi ngovei to sʉnʉsi ci ci fucu o 'o isi toai ci beahci.
S.PHON: oh mo ssŋɨʦ tos ho mɨ isi tesphs ns ito fuʦu ns ito to isi ŋovei to sɨnɨsi ʦi ʦi fuʦu o ʔo isi tosi ʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.FORM: oh mo asngʉc toa ho mʉ isi teapha na ito fucu na ito to isi ngovei to sʉnʉsi ci ci fucu o 'o isi toai ci beahci.
S.PHON: oh mo ssŋɨʦ tos ho mɨ isi tesphs ns ito fuʦu ns ito to isi ŋovei to sɨnɨsi ʦi ʦi fuʦu o ʔo isi tosi ʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.TRANSL: 他一直採,把採下來的水果放在那個掛在他脖子上的袋子裡.

TRANSL.notes: He didn't stop, and put (the fruit) into the bag that was hung on his neck.

S.TRANSL: He didn't stop, and put into the bag that was hung on his neck.

S.FORM: ho micu ngangcʉngcʉ mo eu'sipeohʉ to evi ho.
S.PHON: ho miʦu ŋsŋʦɨŋʦɨ mo euʔsipeohɨ to evi ho.
S.FORM: ho micu ngangcʉngcʉ mo eu'sipeohʉ to evi ho.
S.PHON: ho miʦu ŋsŋʦɨŋʦɨ mo euʔsipeohɨ to evi ho.
S.TRANSL: 如果袋子滿了,他就爬下來.

TRANSL.notes: He climbed down the tree when it (the bag) was full.

S.TRANSL: He climbed down the tree when it was full.

S.FORM: ho sia to oh sia to isi ah to tesi sii ci khago.
S.PHON: ho sis to oh sis to isi sh to tesi sii ʦi khs*o.
S.FORM: ho sia to oh sia to isi ah to tesi sii ci khago.
S.PHON: ho sis to oh sis to isi sh to tesi sii ʦi khs*o.

TRANSL.notes: (把水果)放在籃子裡.

S.TRANSL: 放在籃子裡.

TRANSL.notes: And put (the fruit) in the basket.

S.TRANSL: And put in the basket.

S.FORM: ho i ivaho eu'sipepe ho toa to beahci to bunʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ho i ivsho euʔsipepe ho tos to ɓeshʦi to ɓunɨvhɨ.
S.FORM: ho i ivaho eu'sipepe ho toa to beahci to bunʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ho i ivsho euʔsipepe ho tos to ɓeshʦi to ɓunɨvhɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 他又再次爬上(樹)採水果.

S.TRANSL: 他又再次爬上 採水果.
He then climbed up again to pick plum fruit.

S.FORM: neaomane micu pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eon to jidensa ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: nesomsne miʦu psn to mo suʦsefi ʦi mo eon to ji*enss ʦi ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: neaomane micu pan to mo sucaefi ci mo eon to jidensa ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: nesomsne miʦu psn to mo suʦsefi ʦi mo eon to ji*enss ʦi ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 一會兒,有一個男孩騎著腳踏車經過.
For a while, there was a boy riding a bike passed by.

S.FORM: mo tos mo tosvo to to isi sii to beahci to isi toai.
S.PHON: mo tos mo tosvo to to isi sii to ɓeshʦi to isi tosi.
S.FORM: mo tos mo tosvo to to isi sii to beahci to isi toai.
S.PHON: mo tos mo tosvo to to isi sii to ɓeshʦi to isi tosi.

TRANSL.notes: 他(男孩)停在那人放採下來的水果的地方.

S.TRANSL: 他 停在那人放採下來的水果的地方.
He stopped where the gathered fruit was put/laid.

S.FORM: ia siai isi asona na'na tata'za ho isi aha'va cono hafa 'o mo eon to khago ci beahci ho.
S.PHON: is sisi isi ssons nsʔns tstsʔzs ho isi shsʔvs ʦono hsfs ʔo mo eon to khs*o ʦi ɓeshʦi ho.
S.FORM: ia siai isi asona na'na tata'za ho isi aha'va cono hafa 'o mo eon to khago ci beahci ho.
S.PHON: is sisi isi ssons nsʔns tstsʔzs ho isi shsʔvs ʦono hsfs ʔo mo eon to khs*o ʦi ɓeshʦi ho.
S.TRANSL: 他可能想要那些水果,帶走了一籃.
He probably wanted to have the fruit, and took one basket of fruit away.

S.FORM: ho cu sia to jidensa ho mongoi.
S.PHON: ho ʦu sis to ji*enss ho moŋoi.
S.FORM: ho cu sia to jidensa ho mongoi.
S.PHON: ho ʦu sis to ji*enss ho moŋoi.
S.TRANSL: 放在腳踏車上,然後離開.
Put it on the bike and left.

S.FORM: o'a isi maka cohivi na ito mo toa ci mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o.
S.PHON: oʔs isi msks ʦohivi ns ito mo tos ʦi mo ssonɨ sŋu ʔsnsnsʔo.
S.FORM: o'a isi maka cohivi na ito mo toa ci mo asonʉ angu 'anana'o.
S.PHON: oʔs isi msks ʦohivi ns ito mo tos ʦi mo ssonɨ sŋu ʔsnsnsʔo.

TRANSL.notes: 那個(採果的老人)完全沒注意到,或許是太努力(摘果子).

S.TRANSL: 那個 完全沒注意到,或許是太努力 .

TRANSL.notes: It wasn't noticed at all (by the old man), because he was so devoted to the picking of the fruit.

S.TRANSL: It wasn't noticed at all , because he was so devoted to the picking of the fruit.

S.FORM: i'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu hafa 'o mo ah 'o mo cono khago ci beahci ho ho eon to jidensa u ho mongoi.
S.PHON: iʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu hsfs ʔo mo sh ʔo mo ʦono khs*o ʦi ɓeshʦi ho ho eon to ji*enss u ho moŋoi.
S.FORM: i'o oko no hahocngʉ isi cu hafa 'o mo ah 'o mo cono khago ci beahci ho ho eon to jidensa u ho mongoi.
S.PHON: iʔo oko no hshoʦŋɨ isi ʦu hsfs ʔo mo sh ʔo mo ʦono khs*o ʦi ɓeshʦi ho ho eon to ji*enss u ho moŋoi.
S.TRANSL: 那個男孩將一籃水果放在腳踏車上,騎著腳踏車離開了.
The boy loaded the basket of fruit, and left on his bike.

S.FORM: aomane mo eupteʉlʉ 'o mo cihi ci mo maezo eon to jidensa ci mamespingi ho.
S.PHON: somsne mo eupteɨɗɨ ʔo mo ʦihi ʦi mo msezo eon to ji*enss ʦi msmespiŋi ho.
S.FORM: aomane mo eupteʉlʉ 'o mo cihi ci mo maezo eon to jidensa ci mamespingi ho.
S.PHON: somsne mo eupteɨɗɨ ʔo mo ʦihi ʦi mo msezo eon to ji*enss ʦi msmespiŋi ho.

TRANSL.notes: 一會兒他(男孩)遇到一位也是騎著腳踏車的女孩.

S.TRANSL: 一會兒他 遇到一位也是騎著腳踏車的女孩.
A while later, he met a girl who was also riding a bike.

TRANSL.notes: 女(孩)

S.FORM: te eupa zou eupaeupteʉlʉ.
S.PHON: te eups zou eupseupteɨɗɨ.
S.FORM: te eupa zou eupaeupteʉlʉ.
S.PHON: te eups zou eupseupteɨɗɨ.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)會互相...就是互相見面.

S.TRANSL: 會互相...就是互相見面.

TRANSL.notes: (They) will.... That is, met each other.

S.TRANSL: will.... That is, met each other.

S.FORM: isi apemza mi'usni na ito hahocngʉ 'o mamespingi ho mo eupteʉlʉ.
S.PHON: isi spemzs miʔusni ns ito hshoʦŋɨ ʔo msmespiŋi ho mo eupteɨɗɨ.
S.FORM: isi apemza mi'usni na ito hahocngʉ 'o mamespingi ho mo eupteʉlʉ.
S.PHON: isi spemzs miʔusni ns ito hshoʦŋɨ ʔo msmespiŋi ho mo eupteɨɗɨ.
S.TRANSL: 當他們兩個相遇,那男孩很專注的看著那個女孩.
When they came across, the boy was looking at the girl devotedly.

S.FORM: ci ma mo akameosʉ isi ta'poepuza na ito na i'o ceopungusi na ito hahocngʉ micu supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ʦi ms mo sksmeosɨ isi tsʔpoepuzs ns ito ns iʔo ʦeopuŋusi ns ito hshoʦŋɨ miʦu supeohɨ.
S.FORM: ci ma mo akameosʉ isi ta'poepuza na ito na i'o ceopungusi na ito hahocngʉ micu supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ʦi ms mo sksmeosɨ isi tsʔpoepuzs ns ito ns iʔo ʦeopuŋusi ns ito hshoʦŋɨ miʦu supeohɨ.
S.TRANSL: 怎麼會突然男孩的帽子被風吹走了, 就掉了下來.
Why in a sudden the hat of the boy was blown away by wind. The hat fell.

S.FORM: 'a isi maka aiti ho mo ea fatua 'o 'o ntesi mia.
S.PHON: ʔs isi msks siti ho mo es fstus ʔo ʔo ntesi mis.
S.FORM: 'a isi maka aiti ho mo ea fatua 'o 'o ntesi mia.
S.PHON: ʔs isi msks siti ho mo es fstus ʔo ʔo ntesi mis.
S.TRANSL: 看到他要走的路上有石頭.
It was seen that there was stone in the way which he would go.

S.FORM: micu efʉ micu smoftongʉ to fatu ho smopcuku.
S.PHON: miʦu efɨ miʦu smoftoŋɨ to fstu ho smopʦuku.
S.FORM: micu efʉ micu smoftongʉ to fatu ho smopcuku.
S.PHON: miʦu efɨ miʦu smoftoŋɨ to fstu ho smopʦuku.
S.TRANSL: 他撞到石頭跌了下來.
He bumped into the stone and fell down.

S.FORM: 'a te alʉ alʉ supeohʉ omp cono supeohʉ na 'o beahci ci isi ci isi ea ci beahci to na ito bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ʔs te sɗɨ sɗɨ supeohɨ omp ʦono supeohɨ ns ʔo ɓeshʦi ʦi isi ʦi isi es ʦi ɓeshʦi to ns ito ɓɨnɨvhɨ.
S.FORM: 'a te alʉ alʉ supeohʉ omp cono supeohʉ na 'o beahci ci isi ci isi ea ci beahci to na ito bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ʔs te sɗɨ sɗɨ supeohɨ omp ʦono supeohɨ ns ʔo ɓeshʦi ʦi isi ʦi isi es ʦi ɓeshʦi to ns ito ɓɨnɨvhɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 他載走的那(一籃)李子的果實也掉了下來.

S.TRANSL: 他載走的那 李子的果實也掉了下來.

TRANSL.notes: The (basket) of plum he took fell.

S.TRANSL: The of plum he took fell.

S.FORM: moh micu mongoi 'o 'o 'oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: moh miʦu moŋoi ʔo ʔo ʔoko no msmespiŋi.
S.FORM: moh micu mongoi 'o 'o 'oko no mamespingi.
S.PHON: moh miʦu moŋoi ʔo ʔo ʔoko no msmespiŋi.
S.TRANSL: 那個女孩離開了.
The girl left.

S.FORM: eh mo eusuhngu to ceoa ho 'o mo smopcuku ci hahocngʉ ho eh ho aiti 'o t'angosi mo asonʉ isi asona sʉlʉi ho 'o t'angosi ho mo asonʉ congo.
S.PHON: eh mo eusuhŋu to ʦeos ho ʔo mo smopʦuku ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho eh ho siti ʔo tʔsŋosi mo ssonɨ isi ssons sɨɗɨi ho ʔo tʔsŋosi ho mo ssonɨ ʦoŋo.
S.FORM: eh mo eusuhngu to ceoa ho 'o mo smopcuku ci hahocngʉ ho eh ho aiti 'o t'angosi mo asonʉ isi asona sʉlʉi ho 'o t'angosi ho mo asonʉ congo.
S.PHON: eh mo eusuhŋu to ʦeos ho ʔo mo smopʦuku ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho eh ho siti ʔo tʔsŋosi mo ssonɨ isi ssons sɨɗɨi ho ʔo tʔsŋosi ho mo ssonɨ ʦoŋo.
S.TRANSL: 或許他的腳跌傷了,而且或許很痛.
It probably hurt his feet, and it probably was painful.

S.FORM: mo esmi 'o mo teyu ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo esmi ʔo mo teju ʦi ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: mo esmi 'o mo teyu ci 'o'oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: mo esmi ʔo mo teju ʦi ʔoʔoko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 來了三個男孩.
Then there arrived three boys.

S.FORM: ihe 'so to'usni ho zou ivaha teapha to khago na 'o 'o mo aemo'ʉ ci ci beahci ci beahci ci beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ihe ʔso toʔusni ho zou ivshs tesphs to khs*o ns ʔo ʔo mo semoʔɨ ʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi no ɓɨnɨvhɨ.
S.FORM: ihe 'so to'usni ho zou ivaha teapha to khago na 'o 'o mo aemo'ʉ ci ci beahci ci beahci ci beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: ihe ʔso toʔusni ho zou ivshs tesphs to khs*o ns ʔo ʔo mo semoʔɨ ʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi no ɓɨnɨvhɨ.
S.TRANSL: 他們幫忙把散落一地的李子再次放回籃子.
They helped put the spilt plum fruit again into the basket.

S.FORM: hos ho cu zou soveia ho t na i na ito jidensa nai na ito isi eoni to hahocngʉ to oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: hos ho ʦu zou soveis ho t ns i ns ito ji*enss nsi ns ito isi eoni to hshoʦŋɨ to oko no hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: hos ho cu zou soveia ho t na i na ito jidensa nai na ito isi eoni to hahocngʉ to oko no hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: hos ho ʦu zou soveis ho t ns i ns ito ji*enss nsi ns ito isi eoni to hshoʦŋɨ to oko no hshoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 然後把(那一籃水果)放在男孩坐的腳踏車上.

S.TRANSL: 然後把 放在男孩坐的腳踏車上.
And.. then...loaded them back onto the bike ridden by the boy.

S.FORM: ho micu micu ivaho e'ohʉ eupevai om 'o mo tueu.
S.PHON: ho miʦu miʦu ivsho eʔohɨ eupevsi om ʔo mo tueu.
S.FORM: ho micu micu ivaho e'ohʉ eupevai om 'o mo tueu.
S.PHON: ho miʦu miʦu ivsho eʔohɨ eupevsi om ʔo mo tueu.

TRANSL.notes: 那三個男孩離開(他)走了.

S.TRANSL: 那三個男孩離開 走了.

TRANSL.notes: The three boys left (him), and went on...

S.TRANSL: The three boys left , and went on...

S.FORM: ho ivaho e'ohʉ o ho 'o mo eon to jidensa ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ho ivsho eʔohɨ o ho ʔo mo eon to ji*enss ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: ho ivaho e'ohʉ o ho 'o mo eon to jidensa ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ho ivsho eʔohɨ o ho ʔo mo eon to ji*enss ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.TRANSL: 然後他又騎上他的腳踏車.
And then... He went on again on his bike..

S.FORM: iama isi ta'paeo'a 'o ta'paeo'a eaa 'o 'o ceopngu na ito 'o isi apeoha.
S.PHON: isms isi tsʔpseoʔs ʔo tsʔpseoʔs ess ʔo ʔo ʦeopŋu ns ito ʔo isi speohs.
S.FORM: iama isi ta'paeo'a 'o ta'paeo'a eaa 'o 'o ceopngu na ito 'o isi apeoha.
S.PHON: isms isi tsʔpseoʔs ʔo tsʔpseoʔs ess ʔo ʔo ʦeopŋu ns ito ʔo isi speohs.
S.TRANSL: 他忘了他的帽子了,他的帽子掉在地上了.
Alas, his hat was forgot. The hat was dropped by him.

S.FORM: isi elʉa na ito mo tueu ci hahocngʉ ho.
S.PHON: isi eɗɨs ns ito mo tueu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho.
S.FORM: isi elʉa na ito mo tueu ci hahocngʉ ho.
S.PHON: isi eɗɨs ns ito mo tueu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男孩找到那個帽子.
And it was discovered by the three boys.

S.FORM: eo o esohueu ho.
S.PHON: eo o esohueu ho.
S.FORM: eo o esohueu ho.
S.PHON: eo o esohueu ho.
S.TRANSL: 他們對著男孩吹口哨.

TRANSL.notes: (They) whistled (at him, the boy riding a bike).

S.TRANSL: whistled .

S.FORM: euoveia 'o 'o mo cihi ci hahocngʉ ho eoveineni 'o pu ceopngu.
S.PHON: euoveis ʔo ʔo mo ʦihi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho eoveineni ʔo pu ʦeopŋu.
S.FORM: euoveia 'o 'o mo cihi ci hahocngʉ ho eoveineni 'o pu ceopngu.
S.PHON: euoveis ʔo ʔo mo ʦihi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ ho eoveineni ʔo pu ʦeopŋu.
S.TRANSL: 其中一個男孩回來,把帽子還給他.
One of the boys returned, and returned the hat to the boy.

S.FORM: isi fii to mo tueu ci beahci to bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: isi fii to mo tueu ʦi ɓeshʦi to ɓɨnɨvhɨ.
S.FORM: isi fii to mo tueu ci beahci to bʉnʉvhʉ.
S.PHON: isi fii to mo tueu ʦi ɓeshʦi to ɓɨnɨvhɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 他給三個李子(給那三個男孩).

S.TRANSL: 他給三個李子 .

TRANSL.notes: He gave three plums (to the three boys).

S.TRANSL: He gave three plums .

S.FORM: ho micu mongoi.
S.PHON: ho miʦu moŋoi.
S.FORM: ho micu mongoi.
S.PHON: ho miʦu moŋoi.

TRANSL.notes: (被給梨子的男孩)離開了.

S.TRANSL: 離開了.

TRANSL.notes: (The boy given pears) left.

S.TRANSL: left.

S.FORM: ivaho mo'unu maica.
S.PHON: ivsho moʔunu msiʦs.
S.FORM: ivaho mo'unu maica.
S.PHON: ivsho moʔunu msiʦs.

TRANSL.notes: 他往(他同伴的方向)這樣離開了.

S.TRANSL: 他往 這樣離開了.

TRANSL.notes: (He walked) toward the direction of his accompany.

S.TRANSL: toward the direction of his accompany.

S.FORM: i'o mo tueu ci hahocngʉ mo mah to eh isi faeni to oko no hohac hahocngʉ ci ci beahci.
S.PHON: iʔo mo tueu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ mo msh to eh isi fseni to oko no hohsʦ hshoʦŋɨ ʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.FORM: i'o mo tueu ci hahocngʉ mo mah to eh isi faeni to oko no hohac hahocngʉ ci ci beahci.
S.PHON: iʔo mo tueu ʦi hshoʦŋɨ mo msh to eh isi fseni to oko no hohsʦ hshoʦŋɨ ʦi ʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.TRANSL: 那三個男生帶著男孩給的梨子.
The three took the pears given.

S.FORM: ho sucaefi to mo toa toa to ah toa toa to beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ ci ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ho suʦsefi to mo tos tos to sh tos tos to ɓeshʦi no ɓɨnɨvhɨ ʦi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: ho sucaefi to mo toa toa to ah toa toa to beahci no bʉnʉvhʉ ci ci hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: ho suʦsefi to mo tos tos to sh tos tos to ɓeshʦi no ɓɨnɨvhɨ ʦi ʦi hshoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 經過那個採李(梨)子的男人.

S.TRANSL: 經過那個採李 子的男人.
and passed the one that picked..picked pears/plum fruit.

S.FORM: micu sipeohʉ 'o hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: miʦu sipeohɨ ʔo hshoʦŋɨ.
S.FORM: micu sipeohʉ 'o hahocngʉ.
S.PHON: miʦu sipeohɨ ʔo hshoʦŋɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 那個男人(從樹上)下來.

S.TRANSL: 那個男人 下來.
Then the man climbed down.

S.FORM: ne isi cu aoma'va cohivi.
S.PHON: ne isi ʦu somsʔvs ʦohivi.
S.FORM: ne isi cu aoma'va cohivi.
S.PHON: ne isi ʦu somsʔvs ʦohivi.
S.TRANSL: 他終究還是知道.

TRANSL.notes: And (he) finally learned.

S.TRANSL: And finally learned.

S.FORM: mo nana uvo 'o osi auva s auva pangangcʉngcʉa ci osi toai.
S.PHON: mo nsns uvo ʔo osi suvs s suvs psŋsŋʦɨŋʦɨs ʦi osi tosi.
S.FORM: mo nana uvo 'o osi auva s auva pangangcʉngcʉa ci osi toai.
S.PHON: mo nsns uvo ʔo osi suvs s suvs psŋsŋʦɨŋʦɨs ʦi osi tosi.
S.TRANSL: 我剛剛採好已經滿了的梨子那裡去了?
Where on earth had the previously picked fruit that was full gone?

S.FORM: mo aʉlʉ esmi 'o mo tueu ho mah to mo macici m macoconi to mo to conci beahci.
S.PHON: mo sɨɗɨ esmi ʔo mo tueu ho msh to mo msʦiʦi m msʦoʦoni to mo to ʦonʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.FORM: mo aʉlʉ esmi 'o mo tueu ho mah to mo macici m macoconi to mo to conci beahci.
S.PHON: mo sɨɗɨ esmi ʔo mo tueu ho msh to mo msʦiʦi m msʦoʦoni to mo to ʦonʦi ɓeshʦi.
S.TRANSL: 剛好有三個男孩經過,每個人有一個梨子.

TRANSL.notes: There happened to arrive three (boys), each with a pear.

S.TRANSL: There happened to arrive three , each with a pear.

S.FORM: isi at'ingha no eainca.
S.PHON: isi stʔiŋhs no esinʦs.
S.FORM: isi at'ingha no eainca.
S.PHON: isi stʔiŋhs no esinʦs.
S.TRANSL: 他只好想...
He just thinks...

S.FORM: ci isi asona eainca no to'tohʉngʉsi isi ihe nana eaa.
S.PHON: ʦi isi ssons esinʦs no toʔtohɨŋɨsi isi ihe nsns ess.
S.FORM: ci isi asona eainca no to'tohʉngʉsi isi ihe nana eaa.
S.PHON: ʦi isi ssons esinʦs no toʔtohɨŋɨsi isi ihe nsns ess.
S.TRANSL: 或許他想是他們拿走了梨子.

TRANSL.notes: that it probably his thinking that they took (them).

S.TRANSL: that it probably his thinking that they took .

S.FORM: mo c'o maica 'e si 'e os'o aiti.
S.PHON: mo ʦʔo msiʦs ʔe si ʔe osʔo siti.
S.FORM: mo c'o maica 'e si 'e os'o aiti.
S.PHON: mo ʦʔo msiʦs ʔe si ʔe osʔo siti.
S.TRANSL: 我剛看的就像那樣.像那樣.
What I just saw was just like that.
